title: 20-Piece Set of Clear Plastic Cylinder Vases, 2.8 x 4 in Small Vase for Floral Arrangements, Reusable Transparent Vases for Wedding & Party Centerpieces
features: Transparent Design: Showcase floral arrangements in their natural beauty with these clear plastic cylinder vases; perfect for highlighting vibrant flowers and creating a clean look.
Durable Material: Made of lightweight, shatterproof plastic; safe and practical for families and event planners.
Stable Base: Flat-bottomed design ensures secure positioning of flowers or decorative items; won’t tip easily.
Reusable & Easy to Maintain: Simple to clean and designed for multiple uses; perfect for DIY arrangements or candles.
Multipurpose Decoration: Set of 20 vases, ideal for weddings, parties, anniversaries, and any event requiring stylish decor.
description: 20-Piece Set of Clear Plastic Cylinder Vases, 2.8 x 4 in Small Vases for Floral Arrangements, Reusable Transparent Vases for Wedding & Party Centerpieces
